description: HTTP-to-SMTP2GO transformer (multi-enrollment). Each enrollment targets a different SMTP2GO endpoint, provided by the customer via named secrets. Accepts canonical notification payloads (title/body/from) via HTTP POST and transforms them into a SMTP2GO-native message, and delivers it to the customer's own SMTP2GO endpoint.
name: msg-to-smtp2go-multi

request.template: {"api_key":${ customer_secrets.{{ params.api_key_secret }} },"sender":${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_email_secret }} },"to":[${ customer_secrets.{{ params.to_email_secret }} }],"subject":{* _escape_json(_body.title) *},"text_body":{* _escape_json(_body.body) *}}
